title: Lamb Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic curry dish made with lamb and spices. Serve over rice or with naan bread.

ingredients.name: Flavourful oil
ingredients.notes: Such as coconut or vegetable oil

instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add lamb and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove lamb from pan and set aside.
Add onion, garlic, and ginger to pan and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add curry and cook for 1 minute.
Add tomato and cook for 2 minutes.
Return lamb to pan and stir to combine.
Bring to a simmer and cook until lamb is cooked through, about 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve over rice or with naan bread.
